# FlexiLoans

> FlexiLoans (Epimoney Private Limited, an RBI-registered NBFC) provides
> collateral-free business loans up to Rs 50 lakh to MSMEs in India, with
> approval in 48 hours and a 100% digital application. "Loan nahi, Samjho
> Tarakki hai."

## Products

- [Business Loan](/business-loan): flagship unsecured MSME loan — amounts,
  rates, eligibility, EMI calculator, FAQs
- [Term Loan](/loan/term-loan): fixed-tenure business finance
- [MSME Loan](/msme-loan): loans for micro, small and medium enterprises
- [Supply Chain Finance](/loan/supply-chain-finance): vendor and dealer finance

## Tools

- [Business Loan EMI Calculator](/calculators/business-loan-emi-calculator)
- [GST Calculator](/calculators/gst-calculator)
- [Foreclosure Calculator](/calculators/foreclosure-calculator)
- [Term Loan Calculator](/calculators/term-loan-calculator)

## Company

- [About](/loan/about): company, vision, achievements
- [FAQ](/loan/faq): common business-loan questions
- [Contact](/about-us/contact): support channels and office addresses
- [Privacy Policy](/privacy-policy)

## Content

- [Blog](/blog): guides on business loans, GST, MSME finance (English)
- [Hindi](/hi): Hindi-language articles and calculators
